title: puccinellia distans f. litoralis
intro: Puccinellia distans f. litoralis, also known as sea sandwort or sea puccinellia, is a plant species that belongs to the grass family and is commonly found in coastal areas and salt marshes. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Puccinellia distans f. litoralis include its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Puccinellia distans f. litoralis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
